## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Pixis and GrowthX to discuss content production, AI tools, and CMS workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/d5zvr__xy2aZAj7absG_zNRrKCMEyJ8Z?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content calibration articles to be redone with updated workflow for improved tone](https://fathom.video/share/d5zvr__xy2aZAj7absG_zNRrKCMEyJ8Z?tab=summary&timestamp=161.0)
  - [Pixis to onboard GrowthX team to their AI image generation tool (Adroom) for content visuals](https://fathom.video/share/d5zvr__xy2aZAj7absG_zNRrKCMEyJ8Z?tab=summary&timestamp=384.0)
  - [Key differentiators for Pixis: AI-powered performance optimization across multiple ad platforms, proprietary DTC-focused technology](https://fathom.video/share/d5zvr__xy2aZAj7absG_zNRrKCMEyJ8Z?tab=summary&timestamp=566.0)
  - [New content assignments and glossary terms added, focusing more on advertising and AI in advertising](https://fathom.video/share/d5zvr__xy2aZAj7absG_zNRrKCMEyJ8Z?tab=summary&timestamp=848.0)

## Topics

### Content Production Updates

  - [Calibration articles to be redone due to workflow changes affecting tone](https://fathom.video/share/d5zvr__xy2aZAj7absG_zNRrKCMEyJ8Z?tab=summary&timestamp=161.0)
  - [10 articles per week planned once calibration is finalized](https://fathom.video/share/d5zvr__xy2aZAj7absG_zNRrKCMEyJ8Z?tab=summary&timestamp=226.0)
  - [New content and glossary terms added to Content OS for review](https://fathom.video/share/d5zvr__xy2aZAj7absG_zNRrKCMEyJ8Z?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [High-quality writer being sought for article generation; Ada to handle most editing](https://fathom.video/share/d5zvr__xy2aZAj7absG_zNRrKCMEyJ8Z?tab=summary&timestamp=253.0)

### AI Tools and Integration

  - [Pixis developing AI voice model based on Jason's content](https://fathom.video/share/d5zvr__xy2aZAj7absG_zNRrKCMEyJ8Z?tab=summary&timestamp=277.0)
  - [Team to explore how this AI model can be utilized or shared with content agency](https://fathom.video/share/d5zvr__xy2aZAj7absG_zNRrKCMEyJ8Z?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [GrowthX to be onboarded to Pixis' AI image generation tool (Adroom) for content visuals](https://fathom.video/share/d5zvr__xy2aZAj7absG_zNRrKCMEyJ8Z?tab=summary&timestamp=384.0)
  - [Adroom offers specific brand guideline programming and various output sizes](https://fathom.video/share/d5zvr__xy2aZAj7absG_zNRrKCMEyJ8Z?tab=summary&timestamp=435.0)

### Pixis Product Differentiation

  - [Performance AI with no true competition in the market](https://fathom.video/share/d5zvr__xy2aZAj7absG_zNRrKCMEyJ8Z?tab=summary&timestamp=566.0)
  - [Addresses the complexity of managing numerous ad campaign options](https://fathom.video/share/d5zvr__xy2aZAj7absG_zNRrKCMEyJ8Z?tab=summary&timestamp=599.0)
  - [Proprietary AI trained on $2.5 billion in DTC advertising spend](https://fathom.video/share/d5zvr__xy2aZAj7absG_zNRrKCMEyJ8Z?tab=summary&timestamp=672.0)
  - [Third-party optimization across multiple channels, unlike platform-specific AI](https://fathom.video/share/d5zvr__xy2aZAj7absG_zNRrKCMEyJ8Z?tab=summary&timestamp=728.0)
  - [Ability to reallocate spend between channels for better overall performance](https://fathom.video/share/d5zvr__xy2aZAj7absG_zNRrKCMEyJ8Z?tab=summary&timestamp=740.0)

### Content Strategy

  - [New assignments focus on advertising and AI in advertising](https://fathom.video/share/d5zvr__xy2aZAj7absG_zNRrKCMEyJ8Z?tab=summary&timestamp=848.0)
  - [Glossary terms revolving more around advertising](https://fathom.video/share/d5zvr__xy2aZAj7absG_zNRrKCMEyJ8Z?tab=summary&timestamp=848.0)
  - [Balance between general AI marketing content and specific advertising/performance-related content](https://fathom.video/share/d5zvr__xy2aZAj7absG_zNRrKCMEyJ8Z?tab=summary&timestamp=871.0)
  - [New cluster about ad formats added based on competitor keyword gap analysis](https://fathom.video/share/d5zvr__xy2aZAj7absG_zNRrKCMEyJ8Z?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)

### CMS Walkthrough

  - [WordPress-based system with straightforward blog posting process](https://fathom.video/share/d5zvr__xy2aZAj7absG_zNRrKCMEyJ8Z?tab=summary&timestamp=1160.0)
  - [SEO optimization tools integrated into the posting interface](https://fathom.video/share/d5zvr__xy2aZAj7absG_zNRrKCMEyJ8Z?tab=summary&timestamp=1213.0)
  - [Ebooks and guides require dev team involvement for landing pages and lead generation forms](https://fathom.video/share/d5zvr__xy2aZAj7absG_zNRrKCMEyJ8Z?tab=summary&timestamp=1344.0)
  - [Site map provided for GrowthX's internal linking workflow](https://fathom.video/share/d5zvr__xy2aZAj7absG_zNRrKCMEyJ8Z?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Redo calibration articles with updated workflow and share for feedback](https://fathom.video/share/d5zvr__xy2aZAj7absG_zNRrKCMEyJ8Z?tab=summary&timestamp=161.0)
  - [Evan to review the initial calibration articles](https://fathom.video/share/d5zvr__xy2aZAj7absG_zNRrKCMEyJ8Z?tab=summary&timestamp=945.0)
  - [Deepak to inquire about the output format of Pixis' AI voice model for potential content agency use](https://fathom.video/share/d5zvr__xy2aZAj7absG_zNRrKCMEyJ8Z?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [GrowthX team to be onboarded to Adroom for AI image generation](https://fathom.video/share/d5zvr__xy2aZAj7absG_zNRrKCMEyJ8Z?tab=summary&timestamp=384.0)
  - [Ada to incorporate Pixis' key differentiators into product information for content workflows](https://fathom.video/share/d5zvr__xy2aZAj7absG_zNRrKCMEyJ8Z?tab=summary&timestamp=511.0)
  - [GrowthX to test provided site map for internal linking functionality](https://fathom.video/share/d5zvr__xy2aZAj7absG_zNRrKCMEyJ8Z?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
